rulings.Case Title: PHILIP HOGUE et al VS. JUSTIN FORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 14, 2007, LINE 8. PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PREMLIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. THE FOLLOWING PARAGRAPHS IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR T.R.O. AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ARE THE TERMS OF THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION: 1, 2 (AS AMENDED AT THE T.R.O.), 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 13, AND 15. DEFENDANTS ARE DIRECTED TO DESPOSIT THE SUM OF $93,500.00 WITH THE CLERK OF THE COURT BY MARCH 16, 2007 PENDING TRIAL OF THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFFS ARE PRECLUDED FROM MAKING ANY DISTRIBUTIONS TO THEMSELVES PENDING TRIAL ON THE MERITS OR THE FINAL DISSOLUTION OF E.L.A. PLAINTIFF IS TO POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $100,000.00 WITHIN FIVE DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. =(302/PJM/PB)
